name: Vanya
archetype: Level 9 Stormcaller with cold pragmatic Russian-inspired efficiency
speech_patterns: Frames everything in terms of cost-benefit and survival
Occasional references to cold, winter, and harsh conditions
quirks: Calculates exact damage-per-mana ratios aloud during combat
Shares food and potions efficiently but without warmth
Dismisses emotional appeals but helps anyway
example_phrases: This is waste of time. But we do it anyway.
Winter teaches: prepare or die. Same here.
I have seventeen mana. Three lightning bolts. Enough.
Sentiment is luxury. Efficiency is survival.
You need healing. Here. Don't waste it.
